results.name: removal
results.description: Get things off the table.

results.name: remove counters
results.description: Remove counters from stuff.

results.name: remove counters-other
results.description: Remove counters from your opponents or their stuff.

results.name: remove counters-player
results.description: Remove counters from players.

results.name: remove counters-you
results.description: Remove counters from your permanents or yourself.

results.name: removes-mm-counters
results.description: Remove -1/-1 counters from your creatures.

results.name: removes-mm-counters-self
results.description: Removes -1/-1 counters, but only from itself, not from other creatures.

results.name: renegade symbol
results.description: The symbol of the Kaladesh Renegades, depicting a leaking aether reservoir. It resembles an inverted Consulate symbol.

results.name: renew
results.description: Exile this card from your graveyard: Do a thing. Doesn't need to be the specific Renew keyword, just cards that have an ability to exile themselves in the graveyard.

results.name: renown
results.description: Collection tag used to apply the various tags that comprise the keyword Renown. Should be 1:1 with kw:renown.

results.name: repeatable creature tokens
results.description: Repeatable ways to create creature tokens

results.name: repeatable crime
results.description: Repeatable ways to commit crimes by targeting an opponent or something they control.

results.name: repeatable draw
results.description: Draw cards repeatedly, no matter if you go up on cards or not

results.name: repeatable noncreature tokens
results.description: Repeatable ways to create noncreature tokens

results.name: repeatable pp counters
results.description: Repeatable ways of putting +1/+1 counters on creatures.

results.name: repeatable pure draw
results.description: Repeatable ways to draw a card with no additional cost or sacrifice, such as discarding a card

results.name: repeatable sacrifice outlet
results.description: Repeatedly sacrifice stuff.

results.name: repeatable token generator
results.description: Repeatable ways to create tokens

results.name: repeated keyword
results.description: Repetition or stacking of a keyword.

results.name: rescue
results.description: Bounce something you control.
